symtable/SymbolTableType/FUNCTION.name: FUNCTION
symtable/SymbolTableType/FUNCTION.description: Used for the symbol table of a function.

info.excerpt: Used for the symbol table of a function.

symtable/Function.name: Function
symtable/Function.description: A namespace for a function or method. This class inherits from SymbolTable. get_parameters()¶ Return a tuple containing names of parameters to this function. get_locals()¶ Return a tuple containing names of locals in this function. get_globals()¶ Return a tuple containing names of globals in this function. get_nonlocals()¶ Return a tuple containing names of explicitly declared nonlocals in this function. get_frees()¶ Return a tuple containing names of free (closure) variables in this function.
